headline: Dogecoin Admits Its A Joke Alright, But You Can Take The 16100% Gains Seriously
summary: Meme-based cryptocurrency Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) described itself as the longest-running and most successful “joke” in financial history on Thursday.</
